metadata.description: FDE Consultants Protocoles — Forward Deployed Engineering methodology + DeepSCR assurance protocol, packaged as a portable Agent Skill with the Modex MCP runtime.

plugins.name: fde-consultant
plugins.description: The FDE + DeepSCR Agent Skill: Stage 0 Reconnaissance -> Scoping -> Prototyping -> Production -> Feedback, 6-Q decomposition, FDE Assurance Score (0-100, DeepSCR: Hypothesis -> Contradiction -> Verification -> Certification), 7 local MCP tools, and deliverable templates renderable to docx/pptx/pdf via Anthropic document skills.
